_provenance.stage5: Not triggered. 3R all LOW; Political MEDIUM (not CRITICAL); source_diversity_estimate 0.55 (> 0.4).

synthesis_notes: REPHRASED (Stage 2 bias + Stage 3 MISLEADING_FRAMING): 'Salaries are 62% of the budget' -> '62% of the OPERATING budget'. Both stages flagged that 62% applies to the RM39.8b operating allocation (62.45%), not the RM46.5b total (where it is 53%). Fixed in headline, context, hook, fact-2, and view. Primary source: MOF Budget 2026 B/P.42 p.407 (emoluments RM24.8415015b / operating RM39.7757123b); KKM budget guideline updated 22 Apr 2026 (62.45%).

CORRECTED (Stage 3): subsidy framing. Removed the 'RM15 billion budgeted -> RM58.4 billion' pairing. Stage 3 showed RM15b is a narrower (likely fuel) category while the official Fiscal Outlook 2026 total for subsidies and social assistance is RM49b, so pairing RM15b with RM58.4b as 'the subsidy bill' is misleading. Replaced with a category-neutral 'energy-driven subsidy surge' with no contested denominator.

CORRECTED (Stage 3 UNVERIFIED_DETAIL): RM3.06b is reported, not found in a public Treasury document; the minister cited RM3.04b. Now phrased as 'a reported RM3.06 billion' / 'about RM3 billion' and always 'proposed', never decided.

REPHRASED (Stage 3 MISLEADING_FRAMING): 'A cut cannot realistically reach payroll' -> 'fixed pay the government cannot quickly cut'. The directive did target allowances for unfilled vacancies, so payroll is not wholly untouchable; 'cannot quickly cut' is the accurate structural claim.

REPHRASED (Stage 3 UNVERIFIED_DETAIL): 'the base the cut must fall on is far smaller than the cut itself' -> 'the room to cut narrows fast'. Could not quantify protected sub-components, so dropped the unverifiable 'smaller than the cut' comparison (the RM13.9b services line is in fact larger than RM3b).

ADDED (Stage 2 omission fix): the government's stated non-critical targets (official travel, events, utilities, idle/unfilled posts, 10% off services and supplies) now appear in fact-1 sub, so the reframe engages the government's actual position instead of a strawman. Source: Reuters via The Straits Times / The Edge, 29 Apr 2026.

STRENGTHENED-then-SOFTENED (Stage 3 OVERCLAIM): view card converted from certainty ('the cut landing where patients feel it... whether harm occurs') to risk ('little room left before it reaches patients... how much risk to accept'). MOF publicly stated critical services would be protected and no realised harm is established, so certainty would overclaim. Did NOT average into mush: kept the sharp structural point, only changed the modality from 'will harm' to 'leaves little room / risk'.

INTRODUCED (Stage 6 self-verified): RM45.3 billion 2025 allocation and the 'below 2025' comparison now cited to MOF B/P.42 (2025 total RM45.2723728b) and Budget 2026 speech para 176, both surfaced by Stage 3.

STALE-RISK NOTE for Phase 6/8: Stage 3 found no public final Treasury decision through 31 May 2026. Cards say 'proposed' / 'reported'. Re-check immediately before publishing whether a final figure was gazetted after KKM's counter-proposal.
